chapter_title.ar: باب اخْتِلَافِ الزَّوْجِ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ وَ أَهْلِهَا فِي الصَّدَاقِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 52 – Differing of the husband, and the wife, and her family regarding the dower

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/119)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/119)
text: إِذَا دَخَلَ الرَّجُلُ بِامْرَأَتِهِ ثُمَّ ادَّعَتِ الْمَهْرَ وَ قَالَ قَدْ أَعْطَيْتُكِ فَعَلَيْهِ الْبَيِّنَةُ وَ عَلَيْهِ الْيَمِينُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Hameed, from Abu Jameela, from Al Hassan Bin Ziyad,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the man copulates with his wife, then he pays the dower and said, ‘I have given you’, so upon him would be the (burden of) the proof, and upon him would be the swearing (of an oath)’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Hamid from abu Jamilah from al- Hassan ibn Ziyad who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When a man goes to bed with his wife then she asks for her mahr (dower) and he says that he has paid, he must present testimony and take an oath.’”
